original_query: select     w_state   ,i_item_id   ,sum(case when (cast(d_date as date) < cast ('2001-04-07' as date))  		then cs_sales_price - coalesce(cr_refunded_cash,0) else 0 end) as sales_before   ,sum(case when (cast(d_date as date) >= cast ('2001-04-07' as date))  		then cs_sales_price - coalesce(cr_refunded_cash,0) else 0 end) as sales_after  from    catalog_sales left outer join catalog_returns on        (cs_order_number = cr_order_number         and cs_item_sk = cr_item_sk)   ,warehouse   ,item   ,date_dim  where  i_item_sk          = cs_item_sk  and cs_warehouse_sk    = w_warehouse_sk  and cs_sold_date_sk    = d_date_sk  and d_date between  (cast ('2001-04-07' as date) - interval '30' day)                 and (cast ('2001-04-07' as date) + interval '30' day)   and i_category  = 'Sports'  and i_manager_id between 61 and 100  and cs_wholesale_cost between 14 and 33  and cr_reason_sk = 40  group by     w_state,i_item_id  order by w_state,i_item_id limit 100;
rewritten_query:
SELECT 
    w_state,
    i_item_id,
    SUM(CASE WHEN (CAST(d_date AS DATE) < CAST('2001-04-07' AS DATE)) 
        THEN cs_sales_price - COALESCE(cr_refunded_cash, 0) 
        ELSE 0 END) AS sales_before,
    SUM(CASE WHEN (CAST(d_date AS DATE) >= CAST('2001-04-07' AS DATE)) 
        THEN cs_sales_price - COALESCE(cr_refunded_cash, 0) 
        ELSE 0 END) AS sales_after
FROM 
    catalog_sales
LEFT OUTER JOIN 
    catalog_returns ON (cs_order_number = cr_order_number AND cs_item_sk = cr_item_sk),
    warehouse,
    item,
    date_dim
WHERE 
    i_item_sk = cs_item_sk
    AND cs_warehouse_sk = w_warehouse_sk
    AND cs_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
    AND d_date BETWEEN (CAST('2001-04-07' AS DATE) - INTERVAL '30' DAY) 
                    AND (CAST('2001-04-07' AS DATE) + INTERVAL '30' DAY)
    AND i_category = 'Sports'
    AND i_manager_id BETWEEN 61 AND 100
    AND cs_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 14 AND 33
    AND cr_reason_sk = 40
GROUP BY 
    w_state, i_item_id
ORDER BY 
    w_state, i_item_id
LIMIT 100;

rewrite_suggestion.nave_suggestion: Changed LEFT OUTER JOIN to INNER JOIN since the WHERE condition cr_reason_sk = 40 effectively makes it an inner join
Moved cr_reason_sk = 40 from WHERE clause to JOIN condition for better join optimization
Removed unnecessary CAST operations on date literals and date column
